tasks.subject: Task 1: WorkManager Hilt provider + DownloadWorker setProgress
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make WorkManager injectable via Hilt and emit progress via setProgress in DownloadWorker.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/main/java/org/mediadownloader/di/AppModule.kt`
- Modify: `app/src/main/java/org/mediadownloader/worker/DownloadWorker.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] WorkManager provided as @Singleton in Hilt graph
- [ ] DownloadWorker companion has `const val KEY_PERCENT = "percent"`
- [ ] `setProgress(workDataOf(KEY_PERCENT to percent))` called in download loop when totalBytes > 0

**Verify:** `JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/org/mediadownloader/di/AppModule.kt", "app/src/main/java/org/mediadownloader/worker/DownloadWorker.kt"], "verifyCommand": "JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WorkManager provided as @Singleton", "KEY_PERCENT constant added", "setProgress called in download loop"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ShareViewModel — Downloading(progress), WorkInfo observation, finishEvents
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Refactor ShareViewModel to inject WorkManager, expose Downloading(progress: Int) state, observe WorkInfo flow, and emit finishEvents on terminal states.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/main/java/org/mediadownloader/ui/share/ShareViewModel.kt`
- Modify: `app/src/test/java/org/mediadownloader/ui/share/ShareViewModelTest.kt`

**Verify:** `JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest --tests "org.mediadownloader.ui.share.ShareViewModelTest"` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL, 0 failures

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/org/mediadownloader/ui/share/ShareViewModel.kt", "app/src/test/java/org/mediadownloader/ui/share/ShareViewModelTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest --tests \"org.mediadownloader.ui.share.ShareViewModelTest\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Downloading is data class with progress: Int", "WorkManager injected", "download() has no Context param", "Downloading(0) set immediately", "WorkInfo flow observed", "finishEvents emitted on terminal state", "8 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: QualityBottomSheet — LinearProgressIndicator + non-dismissable
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace placeholder text with a live LinearProgressIndicator and prevent sheet dismissal during download.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/main/java/org/mediadownloader/ui/share/QualityBottomSheet.kt`

**Verify:** `JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/org/mediadownloader/ui/share/QualityBottomSheet.kt"], "verifyCommand": "JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Indeterminate at progress=0", "Determinate at progress>0", "Percentage text shown", "Non-dismissable during Downloading", "Dismissable in other states"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: ShareReceiverActivity — collect finishEvents + commit all
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire finishEvents in ShareReceiverActivity so the Activity auto-closes, update download() call, and commit all changes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/main/java/org/mediadownloader/ui/share/ShareReceiverActivity.kt`

**Verify:** `JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL, 0 failures

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/org/mediadownloader/ui/share/ShareReceiverActivity.kt"], "verifyCommand": "JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64 ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LaunchedEffect collects finishEvents and calls finish()", "download() called without context", "0 test failures", "All files committed"]}
```
